  {"id":1,"step":"Verify pg_upgrade binary availability and version compatibility","owner":"DBA","command":"pg_upgrade --version && which pg_upgrade","rollback":"Abort migration, notify team"},
  {"id":2,"step":"Confirm current Postgres 15 cluster status and health","owner":"DBA","command":"psql -c \"SELECT version(), pg_is_in_recovery();\" && pg_isready","rollback":"Abort migration, investigate cluster issues"},
  {"id":3,"step":"Validate all databases and connections are accounted for","owner":"DBA","command":"psql -c \"SELECT datname FROM pg_database WHERE datallowconn;\"","rollback":"Abort migration, document missing databases"},
  {"id":4,"step":"Check for unsupported extensions or features in PG16","owner":"DBA","command":"psql -c \"SELECT * FROM pg_extension;\" && pg_upgrade --check","rollback":"Abort migration, plan extension upgrades separately"},
  {"id":5,"step":"Create full logical backup as safety fallback","owner":"DBA","command":"pg_dumpall --globals-only -f /backup/globals.sql && for db in $(psql -At -c \"SELECT datname FROM pg_database WHERE datallowconn AND datistemplate=false;\"); do pg_dump -Fc $db > /backup/$db.dump; done","rollback":"Restore from backup if needed"},
  {"id":6,"step":"Pause application writes and enable maintenance mode","owner":"SRE","command":"kubectl set env deployment/app MAINTENANCE_MODE=true || toggle-feature-flag maintenance-mode","rollback":"Disable maintenance mode, resume normal operations"},
  {"id":7,"step":"Terminate remaining active connections gracefully","owner":"DBA","command":"SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname NOT IN ('postgres','template0','template1') AND pid <> pg_backend_pid();","rollback":"Restart application connections if needed"},
  {"id":8,"step":"Create final incremental snapshot for point-in-time recovery","owner":"DBA","command":"pg_basebackup -D /backup/pg15-final -Ft -z -P --wal-method=stream","rollback":"Use snapshot to restore PG15 cluster"},
  {"id":9,"step":"Sync filesystem buffers and unmount data volume if external","owner":"SRE","command":"sync && umount /var/lib/postgresql/15 || true","rollback":"Remount volume, restart PG15"},
  {"id":10,"step":"Initialize Postgres 16 data directory with matching locale","owner":"DBA","command":"initdb --locale=$(psql -At -c \"SHOW lc_collate;\") -E UTF8 -D /var/lib/postgresql/16/main --auth-local=peer --auth-host=scram-sha-256","rollback":"Remove /var/lib/postgresql/16/main, restart PG15"},
  {"id":11,"step":"Copy configuration files with PG16 compatibility review","owner":"DBA","command":"cp /etc/postgresql/15/main/postgresql.conf /etc/postgresql/16/main/ && cp /etc/postgresql/15/main/pg_hba.conf /etc/postgresql/16/main/ && sed -i 's/^#*wal_level.*/wal_level=replica/' /etc/postgresql/16/main/postgresql.conf","rollback":"Restore original PG15 config, restart PG15"},
  {"id":12,"step":"Execute pg_upgrade with link mode for speed","owner":"DBA","command":"pg_upgrade --old-bindir=/usr/lib/postgresql/15/bin --new-bindir=/usr/lib/postgresql/16/bin --old-datadir=/var/lib/postgresql/15/main --new-datadir=/var/lib/postgresql/16/main --link --jobs=4","rollback":"Run pg_upgrade --old-bindir=/usr/lib/postgresql/16/bin --new-bindir=/usr/lib/postgresql/15/bin --old-datadir=/var/lib/postgresql/16/main --new-datadir=/var/lib/postgresql/15/main --link if reverse needed"},
  {"id":13,"step":"Verify pg_upgrade completion and check for warnings","owner":"DBA","command":"cat pg_upgrade_*.log | grep -E '(ERROR|WARNING|Success)' && ls -la /var/lib/postgresql/16/main/","rollback":"Analyze logs, potentially re-run pg_upgrade"},
  {"id":14,"step":"Analyze new cluster for optimizer statistics","owner":"DBA","command":"./analyze_new_cluster.sh","rollback":"Re-run analyze or restore statistics dump"},
  {"id":15,"step":"Start Postgres 16 and verify startup","owner":"DBA","command":"pg_ctlcluster 16 main start && pg_isready -p 5433 || pg_isready","rollback":"pg_ctlcluster 16 main stop, start PG15 on original port"},
  {"id":16,"step":"Verify database integrity and object counts match","owner":"DBA","command":"psql -c \"SELECT datname, pg_database_size(datname) FROM pg_database;\" && psql -c \"SELECT schemaname, tablename FROM pg_tables ORDER BY 1,2;\"","rollback":"Compare with pre-migration inventory, restore if mismatch"},
  {"id":17,"step":"Validate critical application queries and indexes","owner":"DBA","command":"psql -f /scripts/validate-queries.sql && psql -c \"SELECT indexrelname, pg_size_pretty(pg_relation_size(indexrelid)) FROM pg_stat_user_indexes ORDER BY pg_relation_size(indexrelid) DESC LIMIT 20;\"","rollback":"Rebuild specific indexes or restore cluster"},

    "tool": "vault",

    "on_failure": "abort_rotation_alert_ops"
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "tool": "vault",
    "command": "vault secrets enable -path=db-new database",
    "verify": "vault secrets list | grep db-new",
    "on_failure": "rollback_vault_config"
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "tool": "vault",
    "command": "vault write db-new/config/postgresql-new connection_url='postgresql://{{username}}:{{password}}@db-cluster-new.internal:5432/app' rotation_statements='ALTER USER \"{{name}}\" WITH PASSWORD '{{password}}';'",
    "verify": "vault read db-new/config/postgresql-new | grep connection_url",
    "on_failure": "delete_db_new_mount"
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "tool": "vault",
    "command": "vault write db-new/roles/app-new db_name=postgresql-new creation_statements='CREATE ROLE \"{{name}}\" WITH LOGIN PASSWORD '{{password}}'; GRANT SELECT,INSERT,UPDATE,DELETE ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO \"{{name}}\"; GRANT USAGE ON ALL SEQUENCES IN SCHEMA public TO \"{{name}}\";' default_ttl=1h max_ttl=24h",
    "verify": "vault read db-new/roles/app-new | grep db_name",
    "on_failure": "remove_new_role"
  },
